CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2003 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-29-2003 Continued To Jul-08-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor
Off Calendar Apr-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Diana Padilla. Robert G. Padrick, Esq. represented Plaintiff Henry Chiang and Thomas J. Feeney, Esq. represented Defendant Larry Jay Keveson. Based on evidence received, the Court grants compromise as follows: Compromise: $36,500.00, Medical liens: $4,787.76, Attorney Fees: $9,125.00 for a total compromise of $21,858.24 to be depositd into a blocked account until the minor attains age 18. Order signed in open court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2003 Continued To Jun-03-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
